raw_input.title: Automation Engineer
raw_input.job_html_or_text: Automation Engineer for manufacturing equipment, robotic systems, machinery control systems, production installations, quality, efficiency, productivity, pre-sales and post-sales phases. Onsite/presencial industrial automation role.

profile.base_cv_text: Backend Python/Django/FastAPI/PostgreSQL engineer with 4+ years, Malaga, open to remote or hybrid Spain/EU. No industrial automation, PLC, SCADA, robotics, plant electrical engineering, or relocation profile.

human_review_notes: Reviewed real case: presencial industrial automation/manufacturing role is not a software backend fit. APPLY_NOW is a critical failure.
